name: Frankie Edgar
oneLiner: The toughness-and-longevity case: UFC lightweight gold, legendary title fights, elite featherweight wins, and enough late-career losses to keep the ceiling capped.
compareShortCase: Edgar is the long-form résumé case: lightweight champion, Maynard trilogy grit, and years of featherweight title relevance against elite opponents.
compareCounter: Frankie has strong title credibility but not huge title-win volume. Several Aldo/Ortega/Holloway-level fights that could have pushed him higher went the other way.
